subcodes.first_line: O friends of the All-Merciful in the lands! The Wronged One remembereth you from His Most Great Prison, and mentioneth you through His verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الرحمن فی البلدان یذکرکم المظلوم فی سجنه الاعظم و یذکرکم بایاته انها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
